title: galium moranii subsp. moranii
intro: Galium moranii subsp. moranii, also known as Sierra Madre bedstraw, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Galium moranii subsp. moranii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
